issues.description: DSL only implements first option (Rest). Card text shows 'Choose one' with two distinct options: Rest OR give −1 cost. Second option (Give −1 cost) is completely missing from effects array.
Missing 'Once Per Turn' restriction. Trigger 'Activated' requires duration constraint or maxUses to enforce once-per-turn limit.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Choose one: • Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less. • Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1 cost during this turn.
